posts.raw_content:
There is a popular myth that they do not discriminate based on income. This is technically correct but misleading. It costs thousands to treat them properly.

This is why the big Hotspot cities for them are all poverty stricken urban shitholes.

When they tell you to be careful on public transport and at schools and libraries what they really mean are ghetto ones, but they don't tell you this and thus people are misled and don't take the precautions they should be when using mixed class locations.

The only reason middle class people even have to worry about them is because poor people and immigrants share hotels and airplanes with you. 

They always talk about how nobody knows why they resurged in the last 25 years but they absolutely do know why they just won't talk about it because it was ILLEGALS. You know the people living 15 to an apartment too afraid to report them because 1. They're normal to them and 2. They will get deported?

The third world brought them back and the urban (and rural) poor perpetuate them.

If the government funded all treatment of them like they did Covid with quarantine (of buildings and property not people) and proper treatment we could eradicate them again along with strict immigration controls.

But that will never happen so just be careful when you share any facility or property with the unwashed that you take heightened precautions. This is common sense since most of you avoid urban places anyway but rural poor places have them too (probably due to sluts who move to urban areas and come back a single mother).
